name: rule_8a_structural_l
description: Rule 8a structural short-circuit — col L (Inheritance) is non-empty, not 'Local', and does not name an external CSP (engine/rules.py:189-199). The orchestrator returns Compliant via the structural branch of classify_row without examining cols J/K text triggers and without consulting the LLM. Pins the third 8a path (after explicit-text and qualified-inherited-from); a regression in _value_names_external_csp's hint list, or in the 'Local'-case-insensitive comparison, would surface here as a wrong source string. Trigger column = 'L', narrative formatter is _format_8a_structural_narrative which embeds the col L value in quotes.

ccis_row.guidance: The organization enforces physical access authorizations at organization-defined entry/exit points to the facility where the information system resides.
